notes:
HOSTING OPTIONS — AI Finance Agent (Internal RCG Access Only)

🥇 RECOMMENDED: Cloudflare Access + Subdomain
Since robyncg.com is already on Cloudflare, this is the cleanest path.
• Deploy the agent app to Vercel or Render
• Point agent.robyncg.com (or ai.robyncg.com) at it
• Wrap with Cloudflare Zero Trust Access → restrict to @robyncg.com emails only
• Anyone outside RCG hits a login wall; team signs in with RCG Google/email
Cost: FREE up to 50 users | Setup: ~30 min

🥈 Vercel + Password Protection
• vercel deploy → add agent.robyncg.com as custom domain (free)
• Enable Password Protection (Vercel Pro ~$20/mo) for a shared team password
• OR use Edge Middleware to roll custom auth at no extra cost
Best for: Quick launch if the agent is already a Next.js app

🥉 Tailscale (Fully Air-Gapped)
• Run the agent on an office machine or cheap VPS
• Install Tailscale on that machine + Rick/Janelle laptops
• Only reachable from devices on the Tailscale mesh — zero public internet exposure
Cost: Free up to 3 users, $6/user/mo after | Best for: Truly off the public internet

QUICK DECISION GUIDE:
• Already on Cloudflare + want RCG-branded URL → Cloudflare Access (Option 1)
• Agent is a Next.js app like the ops tower → Vercel + custom domain (Option 2)
• Rick wants it fully air-gapped → Tailscale (Option 3)
